case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PORT AUTHORITY VS ENDEL ENTERPRISES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PORT AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT ENDEL ENTERPRISES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENDEL ENTERPRISES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PORT AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENDEL ENTERPRISES INC. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,558.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
